top_stories.title: MLB rumors: Yankees eyeing All-Star catcher; Braves focused on offense; Nationals slugger available?

why_it_matters.text: Trade rumors are circulating as the MLB trade deadline approaches in just over two weeks, with reports on the Yankees' interest in an All-Star catcher, the Braves' focus on offense, and potential availability of a Nationals slugger.

top_stories.title: “Multiple Teams” Asking Nationals About Luis Garcia Jr.

why_it_matters.text: The Washington Nationals' first baseman, Luis Garcia Jr., is receiving interest from multiple teams as the team evaluates its plans leading up to the August 3 trade deadline. Discussions are currently in a preliminary stage.

top_stories.title: The Washington Nationals put an historic beatdown on the A’s last night

why_it_matters.text: The Washington Nationals achieved a historic victory over the A’s in Sacramento, scoring 23 runs led by Harry Ford and Andres Chaparro.

top_stories.title: Nationals Reinstate Max Kranick From 60-Day IL; Drew Millas Undergoes Finger Surgery

why_it_matters.text: The Nationals have reinstated Max Kranick from the 60-day IL, while Drew Millas underwent surgery on his left index finger. Manager Blake Butera indicated that the recovery process for Millas's injury is not expected to threaten his season.

top_stories.title: Game #98 On the road in Sacramento

why_it_matters.text: The Washington Nationals face a game in Sacramento, which is described as the weakest part of their schedule this season over the next six days.
